__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus datasource used for Mediabot metrics

panels.title: Mediabot Fleet — Hourly Community Command Center

options.content:
# Mediabot Fleet — Hourly Community Command Center

**Zero panel configuration.** Uses every Mediabot scraped by Prometheus through the `instance_name` label.  
All activity charts are **per-hour** with `increase(metric[1h])`, so quiet IRC channels stay readable.

panels.title: Bots Up
panels.description: Number of scraped Mediabot processes reporting up=1.

options.content:
## Fleet health
One glance: are bots alive, connected, and talking to their database?

panels.title: Heartbeat by bot
panels.description: 0/1 health gauges by Mediabot instance. Useful when the fleet is spread across servers.

panels.title: Reconnects, DB errors and command errors / hour
panels.description: Hourly error pulse per bot. Spikes deserve attention.

panels.title: Fleet inventory now
panels.description: Build/runtime identity and current size signals. Grafana shows what Prometheus scrapes; no host list is hard-coded.

options.content:
## Community activity
Hourly lines, joins, parts, nick changes, and current channel population.

panels.title: Lines / hour by bot and channel
panels.description: Main IRC activity view. Hard-coded to one-hour windows.

panels.title: Top active channels — current hour
panels.description: Top channels over the last hour.

panels.title: Joins / parts / nick changes per hour
Current nick count by channel
panels.description: Who currently has people in the room?

options.content:
## Command center
What people ask Mediabot to do, per hour.

panels.title: Top commands — current hour
panels.description: Global command leaderboard for the last hour.

panels.title: Top channel commands by name — current hour

options.content:
## URL & media intelligence
Hourly URL catches and media/search/AI activity.

## Games, fun & engagement
Trivia, polls, karma, achievements, mood, duels and social features — hourly.

## Safety & operations
Flood guards, auth, partyline, admin operations and netsplit activity.

### How this dashboard stays zero-config

Prometheus decides the fleet. Add or remove scrape targets there, and the dashboard follows through the `instance_name` label.

Every activity panel uses a fixed one-hour window:

```promql
increase(metric[1h])
```

No bot selector, no channel selector, no per-panel editing. Import it and enjoy the fleet view.

title: Mediabot Fleet Dream — Hourly
description: Zero-configuration Mediabot v3 fleet dashboard. Prometheus drives the instance fleet through the instance_name label. All activity panels use per-hour increase(metric[1h]) windows.
